Email TEmplaTEs
Indoctrination Email Template:
This email functions as an introduction to yourself, your company and your product (remember the
3 straight line 10’s that need to be established in order to walk our prospect down the straight line).
Make sure your prospect is made aware of the benefits of becoming a subscriber to your list!
Email Number 1
(Send Immediately once a visitor subscribes to your list via your opt-in page)
Subj: Welcome! Let’s get started…
Firstly, my name is [ENTER YOUR NAME HERE], I’m [BRIEFLY SELL YOURSELF HERE, IN ONLY A
FEW WORDS, THERBY ESTABLISHING THE FIRST 10].
I’m also the [ENTER YOUR TITLE HERE] of [ENTER COMPANY NAME HERE]. What you might not
know about [ENTER COMPANY NAME HERE] is that we are [BRIEFLY SELL YOUR COMPANY HERE,
THERBY ESTABLISHING THE SECOND 10].
I’ll be sending you another email shortly where you can download your [NAME OF THE FREE
PRODUCT YOU ARE OFFERING THEM IN EXCHANGE FOR THEIR EMAIL]. [BRIEFLY SELL THE FREE
PRODUCT HERE, IN ONLY A FEW WORDS, THERBY ESTABLISHING THE THIRD 10].
But WAIT!
Before you do that, I want to thank you for joining the [ENTER COMPANY NAME HERE] family and
cheer you on as you take your first steps to [ENTER PROSPECT’S DESIRED RESULT HERE].
You’ve just made a great decision in joining the [ENTER COMPANY NAME HERE] community, here’s
why:
[LIST THE BENEFITS OF JOINING YOUR LIST. WILL YOU BE SHARING REGULAR INTERESTING
CONTENT? WILL YOU BE OFFERING EXCLUSIVE DISCOUNTS TO LIST SUBSCRIBERS? WILL YOU
BE GIVING EARLY BIRD ACCESS TO NEW PRODUCTS EXCLUSIVELY TO SUBSCRIBERS?].
Here’s what you need to do now to get started…
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 1 of 4 --

Email TEmplaTEs
The only way I can deliver on that promise is if all my emails land directly in to your inbox! So here’s
how to make sure all my emails are delivered and you don’t miss out on any of the [BRIEFLY LIST
THE BENEFITS AGAIN].
You need to whitelist my emails:
You can access easy whitelisting instruction here (no matter which email service provider you’re
using):
http://www.emaildeliveryjedi.com/mywhitelist.php
Once you’re done, all that’s left is to join our Facebook community (by clicking the link below) so
that you can [LIST ADVANTAGES OF SUBSCRIBERS LIKING YOUR FACEBOOK PAGE].
Facebook:
[LINK TO COMPANY FACEBOOK PAGE]
I love connecting with all my community members! So, if you like, send me a personal facebook re-
quest so we can talk further about how I might be able to help you [ENTER PROSPECT’S DESIRED
RESULT HERE].
[LINK TO YOU PERSONAL FACEBOOK PAGE (THIS HELPS ENSURE YOUR LIKEABILITY AND
TRUSTABILITY, FURTHER ESTABLISHING ONE OF OUR 3 10S]
Talk soon,
[ENTER YOUR NAME/COMPANY/TITLE/WEBSITE HERE]
P.S Keep an eye out on your inbox, you’ll be receiving access instructions to download [NAME
OF THE FREE PRODUCT YOU ARE OFFERING THEM IN EXCHANGE FOR THEIR EMAIL]. [LIST
BENEFITS OF THE FREE PRODUCT IN ONLY A FEW WORDS, THERBY FURTHER ESTABLISHING
THE THIRD 10].
You’re going to love it!
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 2 of 4 --

Email TEmplaTEs
Straight Line Content Email 1 Email Template:
SUBJECT: Here it is!
As promised, I wanted to give you immediate access to [NAME OF THE FREE PRODUCT YOU ARE
OFFERING THEM IN EXCHANGE FOR THEIR EMAIL]. [BRIEFLY SELL THE FREE PRODUCT HERE, IN
ONLY A FEW WORDS, THERBY ESTABLISHING ONE OF THE 3 10S].
I know you’re interested in [PROSPECTS DESIRED END RESULT], then the [NAME OF THE
FREE PRODUCT] is the best first step! But, I also know a lot of you guys are really serious about
[PROSPECTS DESIRED END RESULT] and want to take a short cut to achieving [PROSPECTS
DESIRED END RESULT]. If this sounds like you, I want you to check this out:
[PUT A LINK TO THE SLO PAGE OF YOUR FUNNEL].
Check it out, you’re going to love it!
Talk soon,
[ENTER YOUR NAME/COMPANY/TITLE/WEBSITE HERE]
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 3 of 4 --

Email TEmplaTEs
Straight Line Content Email 2 Email Template:
SUBJECT: I’m a little shocked!
I’ve just checked my analytics system, and I’m a little shocked that you still haven’t picked this up:
[PUT A LINK TO THE SLO PAGE OF YOUR FUNNEL].
I know you really want to [PROSPECTS DESIRED END RESULT], and this is the BEST way of
accomplishing that!
I know a lot about helping people [PROSPECTS DESIRED END RESULT]. You see [SELL YOURSELF
AND YOUR COMPANY HERE, LET THE PROSPECT KNOW THE BENEFITS OF DOING BUSINESS
WITH YOU].
That’s why I am 100% sure that this is the (fastest/safest/easiest/cheapest) way for you to achieve
[PROSPECT’S DESIRED END RESULT] is by checking this out now:
[PUT A LINK TO THE SLO PAGE OF YOUR FUNNEL].
But be quick, I won’t be offering this at this price for much longer, it could actually easily sell for
5 times that figure!
Talk soon,
[ENTER YOUR NAME/COMPANY/TITLE/WEBSITE HERE]
I can’t wait to hear how [NAME OF SLO PRODUCT] helped you achieve [PROSPECT’S DESIRED
END RESULT] Here’s the link again:
[PUT A LINK TO THE SLO PAGE OF YOUR FUNNEL].
www.getwsodownload.com	www.getwsodownload.com

-- 4 of 4 --
